name: neurofib
info: This data was generated using meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct. Original information: https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/1162/neurofibromatosis+type+1+clinical+symptoms+of+familial+and+sporadic+cases
description: A national (Turkiye) Neurofibromatosis Type 1 database with 331 probands with tumors. The goal is to determine whether patients are sporadic or familial cases based on clinical features.

Café au lait (CLS).description: Indicates presence of Café au lait spots

Other Symptoms.description: Indicates at least one of these present: Epilepsy, Rhabdomyoma, Ganglioblastoma, MPNST, Leukaemia, Noonan/Watson/Myelodysplastic Syndrome, Cranial/Brain stem tumour

Case Type.description: Whether the case is Sporadic or Familial
